requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Cameroon, as a member of the IEC ecosystem and in alignment with its ANOR standardisation programme (which adopts IEC standards), expects EV charging equipment to use IEC 62196 connectors. AC charging uses the IEC 62196-2 Type 2 (Mennekes) coupler, and DC fast charging uses the Combined Charging System Combo 2 (CCS2) defined in IEC 62196-3 configuration FF. Cameroon's vehicle import market includes European and Asian vehicles; IEC 62196 Type 2 is the dominant connector on European-origin EVs. As Cameroon's EV market is nascent and formal charging infrastructure is minimal as of 2026, no government-mandated connector standard specific to EV chargers has been confirmed from official sources; however, any IEC-aligned infrastructure deployment or tender will require IEC 62196 connectors, and GB/T connectors are physically incompatible with European-standard vehicle inlets already present in the market.
summary.zh: 喀麦隆作为IEC生态系统成员，其ANOR标准化计划采用IEC标准，预期电动汽车充电设备使用IEC 62196接口。交流充电使用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器，直流快充使用IEC 62196-3 FF配置定义的联合充电系统Combo 2（CCS2）。喀麦隆汽车进口市场包含欧洲和亚洲车型；IEC 62196 Type 2是欧洲原产电动汽车的主流接口。截至2026年，由于喀麦隆电动汽车市场处于起步阶段，正式充电基础设施极为有限，未能从官方来源确认针对电动汽车充电桩的政府强制接口标准；但任何符合IEC标准的基础设施部署或招标均须采用IEC 62196接口，且GB/T接口在物理上与市场上已有的欧洲标准车辆接口不兼容。
summary.zht: 喀麥隆作為IEC生態系統成員，其ANOR標準化計劃採用IEC標準，預期電動汽車充電設備使用IEC 62196接口。交流充電使用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器，直流快充使用IEC 62196-3 FF配置定義的聯合充電系統Combo 2（CCS2）。喀麥隆汽車進口市場包含歐洲和亞洲車型；IEC 62196 Type 2是歐洲原產電動汽車的主流接口。截至2026年，由於喀麥隆電動汽車市場處於起步階段，正式充電基礎設施極為有限，未能從官方來源確認針對電動汽車充電樁的政府強制接口標準；但任何符合IEC標準的基礎設施部署或招標均須採用IEC 62196接口，且GB/T接口在物理上與市場上已有的歐洲標準車輛接口不兼容。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for a.c. pin and contact-tube accessories
IEC 62196-3 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
ANOR — Agence des Normes et de la Qualité du Cameroun (anor.cm) — IEC standard adoption

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. Although the GB/T 20234.2 AC coupler has a similar overall shape to the IEC 62196 Type 2, they differ in connector gender (GB/T uses male connector at the charger and female vehicle inlet, opposite to Type 2), signaling protocol (CC/CP versus PP/CP), and contact arrangement, making them physically and electrically incompatible. GB/T 20234.3 DC couplers are geometrically different from CCS2 and use a nine-pin configuration with CAN bus via GB/T 27930 communication, incompatible with the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 communication stack. Any European or IEC-standard EV already present in Cameroon cannot be charged with a GB/T-only charger without hardware conversion.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。尽管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形与IEC 62196 Type 2相近，但两者在接口性别（GB/T充电桩端为公口、车辆端为母口，与Type 2相反）、信号协议（CC/CP与PP/CP）及触点排列上均不同，在物理和电气层面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器与CCS2在几何形状上不同，采用九针配置并通过GB/T 27930 CAN总线通信，与CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通信栈不兼容。喀麦隆市场上任何已有的欧洲或IEC标准电动汽车，在不进行硬件改造的情况下均无法使用仅支持GB/T接口的充电桩。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。儘管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形與IEC 62196 Type 2相近，但兩者在接口性別（GB/T充電樁端為公口、車輛端為母口，與Type 2相反）、信號協議（CC/CP與PP/CP）及觸點排列上均不同，在物理和電氣層面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器與CCS2在幾何形狀上不同，採用九針配置並通過GB/T 27930 CAN總線通訊，與CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通訊棧不兼容。喀麥隆市場上任何已有的歐洲或IEC標準電動汽車，在不進行硬體改造的情況下均無法使用僅支持GB/T接口的充電樁。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-compatible with IEC 62196-standard vehicles present in Cameroon. Conversion requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, proximity pilot and control pilot signaling, DC communication stack (from GB/T 27930 CAN to IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 for CCS2), labels, test reports, temperature-rise evidence, and spare-part strategy adapted for Cameroon's tropical climate and limited local supply chains. Adapters are not an accepted substitute for project-compliant connector design. Exporters must confirm the connector type required by the specific deployment, project owner, or tender specification before quoting. Given the nascent EV market in Cameroon, exporters should also assess the realistic demand for DC fast charging versus lower-power AC charging, which may be more practical given grid constraints.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩与喀麦隆市场上的IEC 62196标准车辆不兼容。转换需要对耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、接近导引和控制导引信号、直流通信栈（在CCS2场景下从GB/T 27930 CAN转换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、标签、测试报告、温升证据，以及适配喀麦隆热带气候和有限本地供应链的备件策略进行硬件重新设计。转接器不是项目合规接口设计的替代方案。出口商在报价前须确认具体部署、项目业主或招标规范所要求的接口类型。鉴于喀麦隆电动汽车市场处于起步阶段，出口商还应评估直流快充与较低功率交流充电的实际需求——考虑到电网制约，后者在实际操作中可能更为可行。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁與喀麥隆市場上的IEC 62196標準車輛不兼容。轉換需要對耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、接近導引和控制導引信號、直流通訊棧（在CCS2場景下從GB/T 27930 CAN轉換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、標籤、測試報告、溫升證據，以及適配喀麥隆熱帶氣候和有限本地供應鏈的備件策略進行硬體重新設計。轉接器不是項目合規接口設計的替代方案。出口商在報價前須確認具體部署、項目業主或招標規範所要求的接口類型。鑒於喀麥隆電動汽車市場處於起步階段，出口商還應評估直流快充與較低功率交流充電的實際需求——考慮到電網制約，後者在實際操作中可能更為可行。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is required by project specification, tender, or deployment context; physical incompatibility with GB/T connectors makes substitution impossible without hardware redesign; no single mandatory Cameroon-specific EV connector regulation confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion is a hardware and protocol redesign, not a paperwork exercise. GB/T connectors cannot be plugged into IEC 62196 vehicle inlets. Any EV charging deployment in Cameroon targeting European-standard vehicles requires IEC 62196 Type 2 (AC) and CCS2 (DC) connectors. Confirm the connector requirement before quoting, labelling, or shipping.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口转换是硬件和协议重新设计，而非文件替换。GB/T接口无法插入IEC 62196车辆接口。在喀麦隆面向欧洲标准车辆的任何电动汽车充电部署均须采用IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）和CCS2（直流）接口。在报价、贴标或发货前应确认接口要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口轉換是硬體和協議重新設計，而非文件替換。GB/T接口無法插入IEC 62196車輛接口。在喀麥隆面向歐洲標準車輛的任何電動汽車充電部署均須採用IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）和CCS2（直流）接口。在報價、貼標或發貨前應確認接口要求。
